discipline: honest-empty and published at exact status — where a number is not earned, a defensible blank is shown; never a fabricated metric

measurable_now.name: Identifiability
measurable_now.definition: no duplicate-merge — every Decision Asset is uniquely identifiable

measurable_now.name: Immutability / supersession
measurable_now.definition: corrections by supersession only; the ledger is append-only

measurable_now.name: Evidence maturity
measurable_now.definition: the E0–E5 grade of the evidence graph

measurable_now.name: Baseline presence + resolution rule
measurable_now.definition: a paired baseline is frozen at mint and a proper resolution rule is set

note: the Bench means something before a single forecast resolves: the measurable-now modules are live; the calibration modules are honest-empty until the corpus resolves
